_comment_TOKEN: Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN in environment, not in this file
_comment_MAX_ATTEMPTS: How many HTTP attempts are made before giving up (minimum 1)
_comment_RETRY_DELAY: Delay in seconds between HTTP retry attempts (minimum 0)
_comment_REQUEST_TIMEOUT: HTTP timeout in seconds for each requests.get call (minimum 1)
_comment_MIN_REQUEST_INTERVAL_SECONDS: Minimum interval between real network requests. Parser skips runs inside this window to avoid hammering the site
_comment_CF_COOLDOWN_SECONDS: Cooldown after an explicit Cloudflare block/403 before any new network request is allowed
_comment_PARSER_MODE: Parser strategy: auto (HTML then API fallback), api (Camouflage API only), html (HTML only)
_comment_DEBUG: Enable extended technical logs and API payload dump to debug_api_payloads.json
